Naive implementations of mathematical functions for double precision numbers and a software license.


## Files
- **[floor.c](floor.c.md)**: Naive implementation of the `floor` function for double precision floating-point numbers.
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: License for Sun Microsystems, Inc. software with permissions for use, modification, and distribution.
- **[log.c](log.c.md)**: Implementation of the natural logarithm function for double precision floating-point numbers.
- **[pow.c](pow.c.md)**: Implementation of the `pow` function to compute x raised to the power of y, with special case handling.
- **[round.c](round.c.md)**: Naive implementation of a rounding function for double precision numbers.
- **[scalbn.c](scalbn.c.md)**: Implements the `scalbn` function to compute \( x \times 2^n \) using exponent manipulation.
- **[sqrt.c](sqrt.c.md)**: Implementation of the `sqrt` function using integer arithmetic for bit-by-bit computation.
